description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Update Precompiled Tools that can be triggered manually with inputs for pushing to a submodule, creating full binaries, and creating new binaries. On a Windows 2022 environment, check out the repository with submodules, set up MSBuild, run CMake, build projects with MSBuild, and conditionally create and upload artifacts for full binaries and new precompiled tools. If specified, commit and push updated precompiled tools to a submodule repository.
